title: digitaria corymbosa
intro: Digitaria corymbosa, also known as Finger Grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Digitaria corymbosa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infections, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Digitaria corymbosa typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
